comment.text: This translation key describes the minimum lifetime of a session. It is used to set the duration for which user data remains stored in session storage.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English text 'Lifetime (min)' refers to the duration/period of existence, whereas the Arabic translation 'الوقت المتبقي (دقيقة)' means 'Remaining time (minute)'. This changes the meaning from a setting for duration to a status of time left.

The word 'Elinikä' refers to the biological lifespan of a living being. In a technical context regarding session duration, 'Kesto' (duration) or 'Elinikä' used metaphorically is incorrect; 'Istunnon kesto' or simply 'Kesto' is the standard technical term.
The Armenian translation 'Աշխատաժամ' means 'Working hours' or 'Workload', whereas the English 'Lifetime' in this context refers to 'Duration' or 'Period of existence'.
The word '수명' (sumyeong) refers to the biological lifespan of a living organism. In a technical context regarding session duration, '유지 시간' or '만료 시간' is the correct term.
The term 'Lifetime' in this technical context refers to 'duration' or 'validity period' of a session, not 'the duration of a human life'. 'ຕະຫຼອດຊີວິດ' means 'throughout one's life/lifelong'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ໄລຍະເວລາ (ນາທີ)

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Polish translation 'Długość' means 'Length' (spatial or physical), whereas the English 'Lifetime' in this context refers to 'Duration' or 'Time period'.

The English abbreviation '(min)' refers to 'minutes' in the context of session duration, but the Turkish translation 'Kullanım ömrü' refers to 'product lifespan/shelf life'. Additionally, 'dk' is the correct abbreviation for minutes, but the term 'Kullanım ömrü' is semantically incorrect for a session timeout/lifetime setting.

The word '寿命' (shòumìng) typically refers to the biological lifespan of a living being or the operational life of hardware. In the context of a digital session duration, '有效期' (validity period) or '会话时长' (session duration) is the correct technical term.
